subcodes.first_line: O thou bird soaring in the firmament of the love of the All-Merciful! The Wronged One of the world remembereth thee from His Most Great Prison, even as thou didst remember Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائر فی هوآء محبه الرحمن یذکرک مظلوم العالم فی سجنه الاعظم کما ذکرک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for prosperity, @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
